meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Advanced Checklist for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Break through your coding plateau. Master Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade portfolio projects. Start leveling up now.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with basic tutorials. Leverage AI-driven version control to manage complex features and debug efficiently. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform Git from a simple backup tool into an intelligent pair-programmer that accelerates your development velocity and code quality.
content.intro:
You’ve built the to-do lists and the weather dashboards, but every time you attempt a real-world application, the complexity collapses your progress. You're trapped in a cycle of 'tutorial hell,' watching hours of content only to find yourself unable to debug your own architecture. The wall between student projects and professional engineering isn't talent; it's the mastery of your development environment.

Today, we shatter that wall. By fusing Git’s rigorous version control with the cognitive power of Claude Code and the architectural foresight of Antigravity, you will stop fighting your codebase and start orchestrating it. This is how you stop building toys and start building software that scales.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to define your project structure and Git branch strategy to ensure scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements for a [Project Name]. Define a modular file architecture and a Git branching model (GitFlow) that supports feature-based development.

steps.title: Context-Aware Feature Branching
steps.description: Create isolated branches for specific features. Use AI to generate clear, conventional commit messages that document your logic flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feature specification for user authentication. Map out the necessary files and Git branch naming convention.

steps.title: AI-Driven Incremental Commits
steps.description: Avoid massive, unreadable diffs. Use Claude Code to analyze your changes and commit atomic chunks that represent distinct logical units.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current diff and write a concise, conventional commit message following the 'feat: description' format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'feat: implement JWT validation middleware'

steps.title: Automated Code Review Loops
steps.description: Treat your AI as a senior reviewer. Before merging, use Claude Code to audit your branch against industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior engineer code review on this branch. Identify potential security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.

steps.title: Conflict Resolution and Rebase
steps.description: When your feature branch drifts from main, use AI to resolve merge conflicts with semantic awareness rather than brute-force guessing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I have merge conflicts in user.controller.ts. Analyze the logic in both branches and provide the correct merged implementation.

pro_tips: Always use --dry-run with Claude Code when performing large refactors to see the planned file modifications first.
Tag your Git commits with semantic versioning (v0.1.0) as soon as you hit a milestone to keep your portfolio history clean.
Use Antigravity to generate a README.md that automatically updates based on your Git commit history for professional documentation.
Configure a .gitignore file using an AI template specifically for your stack to avoid committing sensitive env vars or build artifacts.
Run 'claude chat' inside your repo to ask 'How does this module interact with the rest of the system?' to maintain high-level awareness.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a staging environment and use Claude Code to write integration tests for your primary user flows.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects gather dust on your hard drive. Transform your workflow, master the tools of the trade, and build a portfolio that gets you hired. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Avoid massive, unreadable diffs. Use Claude Code to analyze your changes and commit atomic chunks that represent distinct logical units.
